# BP-138 negative: the GORM hook stays local and does not perform external I/O.
lang: go
file: BP-138-safe.go
variant: gorm-local-hook
---
package sample

import "gorm.io/gorm"

type User struct {
	AuditReady bool
}

// AfterCreate marks the user ready for local auditing.
func (u *User) AfterCreate(tx *gorm.DB) error {
	u.AuditReady = true
	return nil
}
